headline: Barclays Initiates Coverage On Snap-on with Overweight Rating, Announces Price Target of $420
summary: Barclays  analyst John Babcock   initiates coverage on Snap-on (NYSE:SNA) with a Overweight rating and announces Price Target of $420.
